channel.title: Raigulus Division 2 Video Feed
channel.description: The latest Raigulus Division 2 walkthroughs, PvP clips, build tests, speedrun attempts, manhunts, boss guides, and no commentary gameplay.

item.title: The Division 2 Builds and Build Tests
item.description: Video-backed Division 2 build tests for Bluescreen, Tipping Scales, Whiplash, Regulus, Rage Harvest, Toxic DZ, and Tier 10.

item.title: Division 2 Loot Today, Targeted Loot & Farming Guides
item.description: Division 2 loot today, targeted loot, loot map context, farming routes, and Raigulus videos.

item.title: Division 2 Server Status, Maintenance & Delta-03
item.description: Unofficial Division 2 server status tracker for maintenance, outage, Delta-03, official source links, and Raigulus guides.

item.title: Division 2 Escalation Loot Today & Tier 10 Guide
item.description: Division 2 Escalation loot today, Tier 10 matchmaking notes, vendor caches, and Raigulus videos.

item.title: Division 2 Prototype Gear & Escalation Vendor Guide
item.description: Division 2 Prototype Gear Cache, Escalation vendor, and gear cache planning notes.

item.title: The Division 2 Retaliation Gameplay | Open World Activity Run [2026]
item.description: The Division 2 Retaliation gameplay run covering the open-world activity, enemy pressure, objectives, and Kill Squad encounters.

item.title: The Division 2 Y8S2 Scout 4 Walkthrough | Week 4 Manhunt [2026]
item.description: The Division 2 Y8S2 Scout 4 walkthrough covering East Mall, True Sons bounties, and Jefferson Trade Center.

item.title: The Division 2 Coney Island Amusement Park Tier 10 Escalation [2026]
item.description: The Division 2 Coney Island Amusement Park Tier 10 Escalation run with full gameplay, enemy waves, objectives, and loot checks.

item.title: The Division 2 Tier 10 Escalation | 117 Kills with Rage Harvest [2026]
item.description: The Division 2 Tier 10 Escalation run with 117 kills during Rage Harvest, testing whether the event is OP or painful.

item.title: The Division 2 Dark Zone Surge Starts July 7 | DZ XP #shorts
item.description: The Division 2 Dark Zone Surge runs July 7-14, 2026 with 3x DZ XP, double DZ Currency, and XP protection.

item.title: Raigulus vs uD1eByHunter | The Division 2 Dark Zone Door 1v1 [2026]
item.description: The Division 2 friendly Dark Zone door 1v1 vs uD1eByHunter with Regulus shots, trades, and no-rules DZ PvP.

item.title: The Division 2 DARPA Tier 10 Escalation | 6M Rage Harvest Hits [2026]
item.description: The Division 2 DARPA Tier 10 Escalation run with Rage Harvest, Bluescreen, Tipping Scales, and 6M per-bullet damage.

item.title: The Division 2 National Bond Armory SHD XP Farm | 1 Hour Regulus Test [2026]
item.description: The Division 2 National Bond Armory SHD XP farm tested for 1 hour with Regulus during Rage Harvest.

item.title: The Division 2 Y8S2 Week 3 Scout Walkthrough | Hyena Objectives [2026]
item.description: The Division 2 Y8S2 Week 3 Scout walkthrough covering District Union Arena, Hyena activities, and Elite Hyena kills.

item.title: The Division 2 Iron Horse Raid Speedrun 18:49 | Open Gate Era Archive
item.description: The Division 2 Operation Iron Horse raid speedrun in 18:49 from the old Open Gate strat era.

item.title: The Division 2 Conflict PvP Regulus Gameplay | 2021 Archive
item.description: The Division 2 Conflict PvP Regulus gameplay from a 2021 archive match with audio removed due to copyright.

item.title: The Division 2 Toxic DZ Changed | TUY8S2.1 Update #shorts
item.description: The Division 2 TUY8S2.1 update changed Toxic DZ farming, added Rage Harvest, and launched the Dead by Daylight Event Pass.

item.title: The Division 2 Tier 10 Escalation with Randoms | Bluescreen Build [2026]
item.description: The Division 2 Tier 10 Escalation run with random matchmaking using a Bluescreen + Tipping Scales LMG build.

item.title: The Division 2 Y8S2 Week 2 Scout Walkthrough | Scout 2 Manhunt [2026]
item.description: The Division 2 Y8S2 Week 2 Scout walkthrough covering hostile activities, DZ West selling, extraction, and a lucky drop.

item.title: The Division 2 Variety Pack Debuff Escalation | Y8S2 #shorts
item.description: The Division 2 Variety Pack debuff escalation in Y8S2 Escalation, showing why repeated kill patterns get punished.

item.title: The Division 2 Y8S2 Week 1 Scout Walkthrough | Jackal Manhunt [2026]
item.description: The Division 2 Y8S2 Week 1 Scout walkthrough covering Manny, civilian rescue objectives, and Jackal HVT.

item.title: The Division 2 Coney Island Ballpark Walkthrough | No Commentary [2026]
item.description: The Division 2 Coney Island Ballpark mission walkthrough with no commentary.

item.title: The Division 2 Coney Island Amusement Park Walkthrough | No Commentary [2026]
item.description: The Division 2 Coney Island Amusement Park walkthrough covering Black Tusk, Cleaners, and the Dolores Jones boss fight.

item.title: The Division 2 Tipping Scales Whiplash LMG Build | Non-Stop Shooting [2026]
item.description: The Division 2 Tipping Scales Whiplash LMG build for non-stop shooting, Tier 6 gameplay, and reduced reload downtime.

item.title: Tipping Scales + Whiplash = non-stop LMG pressure in . in The Division 2 | Quick Guide #shorts
item.description: The Division 2 quick guide covering Tipping Scales + Whiplash = non gameplay, tips, and clean no commentary footage.

item.title: The Division 2 Iron Horse Raid 19:03 PB | Open Gate Strat Nostalgia [2026]
item.description: The Division 2 Operation Iron Horse 19:03 PB speedrun from the old Open Gate strat era, uploaded as nostalgia.

item.description: The Division 2 Toxic Dark Zone PvE first look with commentary, build testing, Hazard Protection checks, and general impressions.

item.description: The Division 2 Viewpoint Museum Invaded walkthrough with no commentary.

item.description: The Division 2 Into the Dark update breakdown covering Dark Zone rework, PvP changes, Y8S2 systems, and new gear.

item.title: The Division 2 PvP vs Widdz | Regulus Headshot Nostalgia Match [2026]
item.description: The Division 2 PvP match against Widdz in Conflict, featuring an old Regulus headshot from a 5-year nostalgia archive.

item.description: The Division 2 Manning National Zoo Stronghold walkthrough with no commentary.

item.title: The Division 2 Warhound Weak Spot | Shoot the Legs #shorts
item.description: The Division 2 Warhound weak spot tip: stop shooting the body armor plate and aim for the legs to deal real damage.

item.description: The Division 2 Jefferson Trade Center Hard solo speedrun with a 3:54 PB and another sub-4 run at 3:58.
